fields.name: colorInterpretation
fields.description: possible values one of `RED`, `GREEN`, `BLUE`, `GRAY`, `ALPHA` or a custom string (ex `NIR`)

fields.name: name
fields.description:
The name of the **mask bands** are normalized as:
  - `CLD` for Cloud Cotation
  - `COR` for Correlation
  - `DET` for Detector Quality
  - `EXO` for Exogenous mask
  - `MER` for Dem merging mask
  - `QTE` for Technical Index
  - `REG` for Regulation mask
  - `ROI` for Area of interest
  - `SLT` for Saturation Cotation
  - `SNW` for Snow Cotation
  - `VAL` for Validated area mask
  - `VIS` for Visibility / occlusion
  - `VQA` for Visual control
  - `WAT` for Water mask


Mask is a binary data always encoded in 8 bits with only 2 values:
  - 0 value means exclusion
  - 1 value means inclusion


There is no **spectral band** name convention, it depends of the sensor. By example:
  - `B2`, `B1`, `B0`, `B3`, `P` for SPOT and PLEIADES
  - `B03`, `B01`, `B02`, `B04`, `B05`, `B06`, `B07`, `B08`, `B8A`, `B09`, `B10`, `B11`, `B12` for Sentinel2
  - `P` for Ref3D Ortho

fields.name: noDataValue
fields.description: the value of a pixel that does not correspond to a real data

fields.name: offset
fields.description: offset used in the buffer for this band

fields.name: pixelType
fields.description: the type of pixel of the buffer

fields.name: size
fields.description: size of this band in the buffer
